brand.tagline: Wear your roots with elegance. Handcrafted in Cameroon, delivered across Canada.

hero.title: With Elegance
hero.sub: African-inspired bags, sandals and matching sets — handcrafted in Cameroon with culture, quality and love.

home.storyText: La Fibre Africaine celebrates African heritage through timeless designs and modern elegance. Every piece is handcrafted in Cameroon and tells a story of tradition, craftsmanship and pride — made to be worn every day, everywhere.

about.title: Rooted in Culture, Crafted for Today
about.p1: La Fibre Africaine was born from a simple observation: African families in Canada rarely find products that represent their identity with the elegance it deserves. Cultural fashion was either far away, or it looked like a souvenir.
about.p2: So we went to the source. Every bag and sandal we sell is handcrafted in Cameroon — hand-pieced Ankara patchwork, embroidered toghu velvet from the Grassfields, kente geometry, cowrie shells that were once currency across the continent. Then we bring them to Montréal and ship them across Canada.
about.p3: The name means "the African fibre" — the thread of culture that runs through fabric, through families, and through generations. Our matching sets exist for exactly that reason: a mother and daughter wearing the same cloth, an outfit completed for church or a celebration, a gift that says you belong.
about.quote: People don't simply buy a bag or a sandal. They buy confidence, belonging, memory and identity.
about.v1Text: We honour African culture and craftsmanship with respect. Our pieces are truly made in Cameroon — that story is real, and we tell it proudly.
about.v2Text: Refinement, calm and timeless taste. African prints deserve to be worn at work, at celebrations and in everyday life — with elegance.
about.v3Text: Hand-pieced patchwork, embroidered toghu, cowrie details. We make the artisan's hand visible in every piece.
about.v4Text: We help families pass pride to the next generation — so girls grow up seeing their heritage as beautiful.
about.craftText: We produce in small batches with artisans in Cameroon, which means limited quantities and pieces that are never quite identical. Your order arrives wrapped with the same care it was made with — and when something sells out, a new batch is already on its way.

how.title: How It Works
how.s1Text: Choose your pieces and check out — no card required, no payment today.
how.s2Text: We validate your order and arrange delivery or pickup together. We usually reply within a few hours.
how.s3Text: Interac or cash — at delivery in Montréal, at pickup in Lachine, or after confirmation for shipping.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything about ordering, paying and receiving your pieces.
faq.q1: How do I place an order?
faq.a1: Add your pieces to the cart and check out — no card needed. Your order is reserved, and we continue on WhatsApp to confirm everything together.
faq.a2: By Interac e-Transfer or cash. In Montréal you pay at delivery or pickup, once the item is in your hands. For shipping elsewhere in Canada, payment is confirmed on WhatsApp before dispatch.
faq.q3: Do I pay before receiving my order?
faq.a3: Not in Montréal — you inspect your item first. For shipped orders, we send you a photo or video of your exact item being packed before you pay.
faq.q4: Do you deliver everywhere in Canada?
faq.a4: Yes — $12 flat, free over $100 CAD. In Montréal: hand delivery or free pickup in Lachine.
faq.q5: Where do the products come from?
faq.a5: Every piece is handcrafted in Cameroon in small batches, then brought to Montréal. Slight variations between pieces are the proof of the artisan's hand.
faq.q6: What if the item doesn't suit me?
faq.a6: Exchanges within 14 days, item unworn. Just write to us on WhatsApp — it's easy.
faq.q7: Which sandal sizes do you carry?
faq.a7: EU 36 to 43. Unsure about your size? Ask us on WhatsApp before ordering.
faq.a8: On WhatsApp at +1 (263) 880-7371 or by email at contact@lafibreafricaine.com — we reply within a few hours.

ship.title: Shipping & Returns
ship.subtitle: Clear, simple, and you never pay before being sure.
ship.s1p: We hand-deliver your order and you pay on receipt (Interac or cash), once the item is in your hands.
ship.s2p: Free. We arrange the meeting point on WhatsApp and you pay on the spot, after seeing your pieces.
ship.s3p: $12 flat, free over $100 CAD. Orders leave Montréal within 2 business days. Before dispatch, we send you a photo of your exact item being packed, and we share tracking on WhatsApp.
ship.s4p: Interac e-Transfer or cash — no card required. In Montréal, you never pay before seeing your item.
ship.s5p: 14 days to exchange, item unworn in its original condition. Write to us on WhatsApp and we'll take care of it.
